records.title: Compositional characterization of HgCdTe epilayers by infrared transmission

source_bounded_result.sample_90211: no noticeable spectral change between the nominal 3 mm and 250 micrometre beams
source_bounded_result.sample_90239: relative shift between the two rendered transmission spectra

records.critical_interpretation_boundary: The 0.2255 and 0.2304 values are Z_1/2 and Z_i estimators applied to the focused-beam spectrum; they are not compositions assigned independently to the two beam diameters and are not a two-scale variance datum.
missing_fields: original numerical wide- and focused-beam spectra
third calibrated effective scale or reusable high-resolution numerical map
beam-center coordinates and registration
measured or reconstructable wavelength-dependent PSFs
repeat uncertainty and same-specimen covariance
complete sample-specific thickness and depth-weighting metadata
public rights for numerical re-filtering and derived publication

records.title: Spatially resolved and two-dimensional mapping modulated infrared photoluminescence spectroscopy with functional wavelength up to 20 micrometres
missing_fields: native PL spectrum at every raster coordinate
native physical coordinate and acquisition-order arrays
collection PSF and complete excitation-kernel uncertainty
raw interferograms or source-native spectral exports
repeat, drift, and covariance records
reproducible fitting code or complete fitting parameters
multiple physical spot sizes or independently calibrated held-out modality
public rights for numerical re-filtering and derived publication

records.title: Spatially Resolved Photoluminescence and Transmission Spectra of HgCdTe

same_region_contract.modality_1: effective epilayer thickness from transmission fringes

critical_interpretation_boundaries: The effective optical-thickness field assumes a uniform refractive index and can conflate physical thickness, composition fluctuation, and Te inclusions.
PL peak area depends on collection efficiency and excitation power and is not a direct composition observable.
Two modalities at one representative spatial resolution are not two probe scales.
missing_fields: source-native common-coordinate PL and transmission spectra or map arrays
exact registration transform and acquisition order
excitation and collection PSFs
transmission aperture and kernel definition
reproducible fringe-to-optical-thickness operator
repeat, drift, and covariance records
independently calibrated modality-specific nuisance parameters
public rights for numerical re-filtering and derived publication

records.title: Photoluminescence Study of Defects in Mercury Cadmium Telluride

acquisition_and_processing_contract.translation_system: perpendicular Newport stages with Zaber LA-60 actuators
acquisition_and_processing_contract.storage: paired interferograms stored on a hard drive by the control software

missing_fields: paired interferogram files
processed spectra at every coordinate
coordinate and registration exports
control and processing software
repeat and drift covariance
public data license or reuse statement

records.title: Fundamental Research on Infrared Detection
records.prohibited_inference: treating a public report index or rendered report figure as a source-native numerical map package

public_lineage_targets.role: Furstenberg high-resolution HgCdTe PL mapping method
Furstenberg high-resolution infrared PL mapping apparatus
Chen-lineage approximately 2 micrometre resolution mapping system

declared_public_search_classes: institutional repositories and public thesis records
public final reports and grant accessions
DataCite, Crossref, OpenAlex, CORE, and BASE records
Zenodo, Figshare, Mendeley Data, OSF, and Dryad
public conference proceedings, theses, and citing papers
PDF embedded-file, attachment, image, and object inspection

accepted_package_A: at least three calibrated effective scales
accepted_package_B: public rights to apply at least three declared numerical kernels

stop_rules: No analysis branch is opened when only rendered curves or maps are available.
No publication-figure extraction is represented as source-native data.
No nominal beam diameter or quoted spot size is represented as a complete PSF.
No raster pixel count is represented as repeat count or independent scale count.
No multiple-modality record is represented as a multiple-scale record.
No source is promoted when registration, kernels, uncertainty, preprocessing, or rights remain unbounded.
A reproducible public-data-not-found result is an acceptable terminal outcome.
claim_boundaries: The audit records what was located in declared public searches; it does not prove that private or unindexed data do not exist.
Confirmation that native files originally existed is not public recovery of those files.
Rendered publication figures remain source-bounded evidence and are not original numerical arrays.
The current public asset set does not support Q_G evaluation, covariance-family fitting, parameter recovery, or held-out prediction.
No specimen covariance, correlation length, composition field, detector result, novelty claim, manuscript, or R05 computation is authorized.
